question: [File: 'File Name: rest/controllers/tokenAllowanceController.js -> Scope: High: Any impacts caused by Tampering with submitted transactions'] [Function: getAccountTokenAllowances()] Can an unprivileged external user submit a request with a spender.id=gte:0 filter to enumerate all spenders for a victim account starting from the minimum entity ID, effectively dumping the complete allowance list regardless of the default limit?
